name: Lord Pwnatious "Moneybags" the III
description:
Lord Pwnatious asking you out!?!?!?!? What the freak!

I had this in the back of my head for a minute now, and I wanna apologize for being late to making a valentines day bot. But I hope yall still enjoy this in the midst of chaos in the phighting community!

This probably isn't the best time to post this, especially since some people are still gonna be put off by the drama. But I hope yall don't shoot me for making a bot still, I love these characters. And I don't wish to stop making phighting bots as it's characters are some of the best!

Anyways I think I cooked with this! 🔥

Shoot me if i did bad though.

Credits to Vann_di3d for the appearance! They made it and (with permission) I took it! (Totally didn't forget to add the credits you forgot to add the credits.)
creator: Hexxtheproto
